macro.title: Mira Murati’s deposition pulled back the curtain on Sam Altman’s ouster - The Verge
macro.summary: Thanks to Musk v. Altman, the public is getting a concrete look at details of Sam Altman’s ouster from OpenAI, much of it centered on former CTO Mira Murati.

macro.title: Corporate Card Startup Ramp Raising Funds at $40 Billion Valuation - WSJ
Consumers are ‘running out of money’ and cutting back, CEOs warn - The Seattle Times
macro.summary: Executives across retail, restaurants and packaged goods are increasingly worried about U.S. shoppers with tighter budgets.

macro.title: While many international brands retreat, McDonald’s is supersizing its China business - CNBC
macro.summary: McDonald's plans to have 10,000 locations in China by the end of 2028, and the country is its second largest market.

macro.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq stall as crude oil steadies in wait for Iran-US deal update - Yahoo Finance
macro.summary: More records are in play amid optimism for a US-Iran peace deal and for AI-fueled earnings growth.
